staging_and_diagnosis.icd10_code: 10 - C20: Malignant neoplasm of rectum - rectal ampulla

07-03-2025.clinical_details:
TWR / DTT
Colonoscopy : At 13cm from insertion there was a malignant looking mass with an abnormal pit pattern suspicious features for malignancy.
07-03-2025.mdt_outcome:
TWR / DTT
CT 29/02/2025: Mid rectal caner with associated mesorectal lymph nodes. Multiple modules within the lungs suspicious for lung metastases. Indeterminate retroperitoneal lymph nodes.

staging_and_diagnosis.icd10_code: 10 - C20: Malignant neoplasm of rectum - rectal ampulla

07-03-2025.clinical_details:
Known prior lymphoma, treated
Now fresh PR bleeding
Weight loss
Referral from haematology
MDT with PET-CT avidity in rectum.
07-03-2025.mdt_outcome:
CT 22/2/2025: no lymphadenopathy. New semi-annular thickening in rectum
PET-CT 1/3/25: no nodal avidity, avidity in the mid rectum- recommend direct visualisation.
Haematology-oncology MDT 3/3/25: for discussion in the lower GI MDT
Lower-GI MDT 5/3/35 – for colonoscopy
Descending colon polyp – well differentiated adenocarcinoma Other polyps – tubular adenoma with low grade dysplasia

07-03-2025.clinical_details: Feb 2025 – adenocarcinoma of low rectum with deficient MMR MRI stage: T2 N0 EMVI negative ISP involved CRM clear PSW clear CRT to downstage
07-03-2025.mdt_outcome: MRI 1/3/25: Persistent low signal, may represent complete response Flexi sig: scar seen
